languages.text: "Вы путаете, Изимонд. Вотчина Гапраков — мир-кузница, где под надзором Адептус Механикус куется стальная мощь династии. Впрочем, вам простительно".
"You are mistaken, Sauerback. The Gapraks' patrimony lies in a forge world where the dynasty's steel might is made under the eye of the Adeptus Mechanicus. However, you are forgiven."
languages.original_text: "Вы путаете, Изимонд. Вотчина Гапраков — мир-кузница, где под надзором Адептус Механикус куется стальная мощь династии. Впрочем, вам простительно".

traits.locale_text: "You are mistaken, Sauerback. The Gapraks' patrimony lies in a forge world where the dynasty's steel might is made under the eye of the Adeptus Mechanicus. However, you are forgiven."
"You are mistaken, Sauerback. The Gapraks' patrimony lies in a forge world where the dynasty's steel might is made under the eye of the Adeptus Mechanicus. However, you are forgiven."
"You are mistaken, Sauerback. The Gapraks' patrimony lies in a forge world where the dynasty's steel might is made under the eye of the Adeptus Mechanicus. However, you are forgiven."

languages.text: «Se equivoca, Sauerback. El patrimonio de los Gaprak se encuentra en un mundo forja que produce el poderoso acero de la dinastía bajo la atenta mirada del Adeptus Mechanicus».
languages.original_text: "You are mistaken, Sauerback. The Gapraks' patrimony lies in a forge world where the dynasty's steel might is made under the eye of the Adeptus Mechanicus. However, you are forgiven."

traits.locale_text: «Se equivoca, Sauerback. El patrimonio de los Gaprak se encuentra en un mundo forja que produce el poderoso acero de la dinastía bajo la atenta mirada del Adeptus Mechanicus.

languages.text: “你错了，苏尔贝克。贾帕克家族的世袭领地在一个铸造世界上。在那里，王朝的钢铁伟力于机械修会的注视下锻造而成。不过，我原谅你的无知。”
languages.original_text: "You are mistaken, Sauerback. The Gapraks' patrimony lies in a forge world where the dynasty's steel might is made under the eye of the Adeptus Mechanicus. However, you are forgiven."

traits.locale_text: “你错了，苏尔贝克。贾帕克家族的世袭领地在一个铸造世界上。在那里，王朝的钢铁伟力于机械修会的注视下锻造而成。不过，我原谅你的无知。”

languages.text: « Vous vous trompez, capitaine. Le patrimoine des Gaprak réside dans un monde forge au sein duquel la puissance martiale de la dynastie s'accroît sous la supervision de l'Adeptus Mechanicus. Pour autant, je vous pardonne votre ignorance. »
languages.original_text: "You are mistaken, Sauerback. The Gapraks' patrimony lies in a forge world where the dynasty's steel might is made under the eye of the Adeptus Mechanicus. However, you are forgiven."

traits.locale_text: « Vous vous trompez, capitaine. Le patrimoine des Gaprak réside dans un monde forge au sein duquel la puissance martiale de la dynastie s'accroît sous la supervision de l'Adeptus Mechanicus. Pour autant, je vous pardonne votre ignorance. »

languages.text: "Yanılıyorsun Sauerback. Gaprakların mirası, hanedanlığın çelik gücünün Adeptus Mechanicus'un gözetimi altında yapıldığı bir demirci dünyasında yatıyor. Ancak affedildin."
languages.original_text: "You are mistaken, Sauerback. The Gapraks' patrimony lies in a forge world where the dynasty's steel might is made under the eye of the Adeptus Mechanicus. However, you are forgiven."

traits.locale_text: "Yanılıyorsun Sauerback. Gaprakların mirası, hanedanlığın çelik gücünün Adeptus Mechanicus'un gözetimi altında yapıldığı bir demirci dünyasında yatıyor. Ancak affedildin."

languages.text: "Ihr irrt Euch, Sauerback. Das Patrimonium der Gapraks befindet sich auf einer Fabrikwelt, auf der die stählerne Macht der Dynastie unter den Blicken des Adeptus Mechanicus gedeiht. Aber egal, ich vergebe Euch."
languages.original_text: "You are mistaken, Sauerback. The Gapraks' patrimony lies in a forge world where the dynasty's steel might is made under the eye of the Adeptus Mechanicus. However, you are forgiven."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr irrt Euch, Sauerback. Das Patrimonium der Gapraks befindet sich auf einer Fabrikwelt, auf der die stählerne Macht der Dynastie unter den Blicken des Adeptus Mechanicus gedeiht. Aber egal, ich vergebe Euch."

languages.text: 「誤解しておりました、ザウアーバック。ギャプラク家の遺産は、機械神殿の監視の下で王朝が誇る鋼鉄の力を作る鍛冶場世界にあります。しかし、あなたは許されます。」
languages.original_text: "You are mistaken, Sauerback. The Gapraks' patrimony lies in a forge world where the dynasty's steel might is made under the eye of the Adeptus Mechanicus. However, you are forgiven."

traits.locale_text: 「誤解しておりました、ザウアーバック。ギャプラク家の遺産は、機械神殿の監視の下で王朝が誇る鋼鉄の力を作る鍛冶場世界にあります。しかし、あなたは許されます。」
